podcast.title: Norah's Notes
podcast.description: Giggles, jokes, and imaginative stories told by a seven-year-old
podcast.author: Norah Tashner

episodes.title: Episode 1: Welcome to the Podcast!
episodes.description: Norah introduces herself, shares jokes, and tells the story about how we got our youngest dog, Penny.

episodes.title: Episode 2: All About Norah
episodes.description: Jokes, True or False, and all about Norah!

episodes.title: Episode 3: Science!
episodes.description: Join us as we talk about science; volcanoes, gravity, DNA, and more!

episodes.title: Episode 4: Snow Day!
episodes.description: Norah reminisces about her recent trip to Italy and tells lots of snow facts!

episodes.title: Episode 5: Sea Turtles!
episodes.description: Join Norah as she spends her 7th day trapped under the ice! We talk all about sea turtles!
